MiniWord_Button_Documentation.description: Complete guide for all buttons and functions in MiniWord application

buttons.name: New Document
usage: 1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the New Document icon
3. Choose the 'Document Type' you want (Blank Document, Business Letter, Project Report, Internal Memo, Personal Resume, Newsletter, Invoice)
4. Change the 'Document Title' to what you want (default: 'Untitled Document')
5. Click the 'Create Document' button

buttons.name: Open Document
usage: 1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Open Document icon
3. Click the 'Choose File' button to select a file
4. Select a file from your computer (.txt, .html, .htm, .md files) or enter the document content in the 'Paste document content...' field
5. Click the 'Open Document' button

buttons.name: Save Document
usage: 1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Save Document icon
3. The filename field will be pre-filled with the Document Title from 'New Document',you can change the filename if needed
4. Choose the 'Save Format' (HTML Document, Plain Text, Markdown)
5. Click 'Save Document'button to download the file with the chosen name

buttons.name: Print Document
usage: 1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Print Document icon
3. Choose Printer (Default Printer or Save as PDF)
4. Select Page Range (All Pages, Current Page, or Custom Range)
5. Click the 'Print' button

buttons.name: Refresh Page
usage: 1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Refresh Page icon
3. Click the 'Refresh Page' button, the page will reload

buttons.name: Close Page
usage: 1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Close Page icon
3. Click the 'Close Page' button, the browser tab will close

buttons.name: Open New Tab
usage: 1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Open New Tab icon
3. Click the Open 'New Tab' button, a new browser tab will open

buttons.name: Toggle Pagination
usage: 1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Toggle Pagination icon
3. Click the 'Toggle Mode' button, your document content will be reformat

buttons.name: Undo Operation
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Undo icon
3. Click the 'Undo(Ctrl+Z)' button, the last action will be reversed

buttons.name: Redo Operation
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Redo icon
3. Click the 'Redo(Ctrl+Y)' button, the last undone action will be restored

buttons.name: Cut Content
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Cut Content icon
3. Select the text you want to cut with cursor
4. Click the 'Cut(Ctrl+X)' button, the text will be removed and copied to clipboard

buttons.name: Direct Copy
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Copy icon
3. Click the Direct Copy icon that under the Copy icon, the submenu will appear
4. Select the text you want to copy
5. Click the 'Copy Plain Text' button, the text without formatting will be copied to clipboard

buttons.name: Formatted Copy
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Copy icon
3. Click the Formatted Copy icon that under the Copy icon, the submenu will appear
3. Select the text you want to copy with cursor
4. Click the 'Copy Formatted Text' button, the text with formatting will be copied to clipboard

buttons.name: Paste
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Paste Content icon
3. Position cursor where you want to paste

4. Click the 'Smart Paste(Ctrl+V)' button to paste the text without formatting from clipboard/ or Click the 'Paste Plain Text' button to paste the text without formatting from clipboard/ or Click the 'Paste Formatted' button to paste the text with formatting from clipboard. Then the text from clipboard will be inserted

buttons.name: Find Text
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Find Text icon
3. Enter the text you want to find
4. Click 'Find' button to locate matches, the find content will be highlighted

buttons.name: Find and Replace
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Find and Replace icon
3. Enter text to find
4. Enter the replacement text
5. Click 'Replace All' button to replace all matches

buttons.name: Clear All Formatting
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Clear All Formatting icon
3. Select the text with formatting you want to clear
4. Click the 'Clear Selected Text Formatting' button, all formatting (bold, italic, colors, etc.) will be removed

buttons.name: Format Painter
usage: 1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Format Painter icon
3. Select text with the formatting you want to copy with cursor
4. Click the 'Copy Format' button, the formatting will be copied
5. Select the text you want to apply formatting to
6. Click the 'Apply Format' button, the formatting will be applied

buttons.name: Zoom In View
usage: 1. Click the 'View' section
2. Click the Zoom In View icon
3. Select Zoom level you want to zoom in(125%, 150%, 175%, 200%, 250%, 300%, 400%, 500%)
4. Click the 'Apply Zoom In' button, the document will be magnified

buttons.name: Zoom Out View
usage: 1. Click the 'View' section
2. Click the Zoom Out View icon
3. Select Zoom level you want to zoom out(25%, 50%, 75%, 90%, 100%)
4. Click the 'Apply Zoom Out' button, the document will be reduced in size

buttons.name: Print Preview
usage: 1. Click the 'View' section
2. Click the Print Preview icon
3. Click the 'Print' button, you can see how the document will look when printed

buttons.name: Page Setup
usage: 1. Click the 'View' section
2. Click the Page Setup icon
3. Configure page orientation (Portrait, Landscape)
4. Click 'Apply Orientation' button to apply settings

buttons.name: Toggle Sidebar
usage: 1. Click the 'View' section
2. Click the Toggle Sidebar icon
3. Click the 'Toggle Sidebar' button, the sidebar will show/hide

buttons.name: Toggle Ruler
usage: 1. Click the 'View' section
2. Click the Toggle Ruler icon
3. Click the 'Toggle Ruler' button,the ruler will show horizontal and vertical
4. Click the 'Toggle Ruler' button again can hide the ruler

buttons.name: Show Hidden Characters
usage: 1. Click the 'View' section
2. Click the Show Hidden Characters icon
3. Click the 'Toggle Hidden Characters' button,space characters, Tab characters, Paragraph marks, and line breaks will be visible
4. Click the 'Toggle Hidden Characters' button again can hide them

buttons.name: Focus Mode
usage: 1. Click the 'View' section
2. Click the Focus Mode icon
3. Click the 'Toggle Focus Mode' button, the focus mode will be toggled

buttons.name: Night Mode
usage: 1. Click the 'View' section
2. Click the Night Mode icon
3. Click the 'Toggle Night Mode' button, the interface will switch to dark theme
4. Click the 'Toggle Night Mode' button again can return to light theme

Insert.description: Insert various content into the document

buttons.name: Insert Image
usage: 1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Insert Image icon
3. Click the 'Choose File' button
4. Select an image file from your computer using the file input
5. Choose the image size (Small, Medium, Large)
6. Move the cursor to the position you want to insert the image
7. Click 'Insert Image' button to add it to your document

buttons.name: Insert Table
usage: 1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Insert Table icon
3. Use the table size selector to choose the table size (e.g., 2x3, 3x4)
4. Move the cursor to the position you want to insert the table
5. Click 'Insert Table' button to add it to your document

buttons.name: Insert Chart
usage: 1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Insert Chart icon
3. Select chart type (Bar Chart, Pie Chart)
4. Enter chart title you want to add
5. Choose the data source (Auto-detect, Manual Input)
6. If you choose the 'Auto-detect' data source, choose the detected table you want to use for the chart
7. Click 'Insert Chart' button to add the chart to document

buttons.name: Insert Link
usage: 1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Insert Link icon
3. Enter the URL in the Link URL field
4. Enter the Display Text in the link display text field
5. Move the cursor to the position you want to insert the link
6. Click 'Insert Link' button to create the link
7. Right-click the link we made and select 'Open link in New Tab' can open the corresponding URL link.

buttons.name: Insert Equation
usage: 1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Insert Equation icon
3. choose the equation type (Basic Equation, Fraction, Square Root, Power/Exponent, Integral, Summation)
4. Enter the equation content you want to add in the equation content field
5. Move the cursor to the position you want to insert the equation
6. Click 'Insert Equation' button to add the equation

buttons.name: Insert Symbol
usage: 1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Insert Symbol icon
3. Move the cursor to the position you want to insert the symbol
4. Select the symbol button you want to insert (→Right Arrow button, ←Left Arrow button, ↑Up Arrow button, ↓Down Arrow button, ★Star button, ♥Heart button)

buttons.name: Section Break
usage: 1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Section Break icon
3. Use the cursor to position the section break
4. Click the 'Insert Section Break' button, the section break will be inserted

buttons.name: Template Library
usage: 1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Template Library icon
3. Click a template from the template library (Business Letter, Report, Resume),the template will be inserted

buttons.name: Bold Format
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Bold Format icon
3. Select the text in the document you want to make bold
4. Click 'Apply Bold (Ctrl+B) button, the text will become bold

buttons.name: Italic Format
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Italic Format icon
3. Select the text you want to make italic
4. Click 'Apply Italic (Ctrl+I) button, the text will become italic

buttons.name: Underline Format
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Underline Format icon
3. Select the text you want to underline
4. Click the 'Apply Underline (Ctrl+U) button, the text will be underlined

buttons.name: Strikethrough
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Strikethrough Format icon
3. Select the text you want to strikethrough
4. Click the 'Apply Strikethrough' button, the text will have a line through it

buttons.name: Left Align
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Left Align icon
3. Select the paragraph you want to align
4. Click the 'Apply Left Align' button, the text will be aligned to the left

buttons.name: Center Align
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Center Align icon
3. Select the paragraph you want to center
4. Click the 'Apply Center Align' button, the text will be centered

buttons.name: Right Align
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Right Align icon
3. Select the paragraph you want to align
4. Click the 'Apply Right Align' button, the text will be aligned to the right

buttons.name: Justify Align
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Justify Align icon
3. Select the paragraph you want to justify
4. Click the 'Apply Justify Align' button, the text will be justified (aligned to both margins)

buttons.name: Text Color
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Text Color icon
3. Choose a color from the color square (black, red, green, blue, yellow, magenta, cyan, grey)
4. Click the text you want to change color use the cursor
5. Click the 'Apply Color' button to change the text color

buttons.name: Highlight
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Highlight Display icon
3. Choose the highlight color you want from the color squares (Bright Yellow, Light Pink, Light Green, Light Purple, Cream Yellow, Light Magenta,  Light Blue,Light Gray)
4. Select the text you want to highlight
5. Click the 'Apply Highlight' button to apply the highlight color

buttons.name: Format Painter
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Format Painter icon
3. Select text with the formatting you want to copy the formatting
4. Click the 'Activate Format Painter' button
5. Select the text you want to apply formatting to
6. Click the 'Apply Format Painter' button, the formatting will be applied

buttons.name: Clear Format
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Clear Format icon
3. Select the text with formatting you want to clear
4. Click the 'Clear Format' button, all formatting will be removed

buttons.name: Superscript
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Superscript icon
3. Select the text you want to make superscript
4. Click the 'Apply Superscript' button, the text will appear smaller and higher

buttons.name: Subscript
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Subscript icon
3. Select the text you want to make subscript
4. Click the 'Apply Subscript' button, the text will appear smaller and lower

buttons.name: Line Spacing
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Line Spacing icon
3. Select the paragraph you want to change
4. Click the spacing options button (Double(2.0x), the line spacing will be changed to 2.0x

buttons.name: Page Setup
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Page Setup icon
3. Click the page size you want to set (A4(210 × 297 mm), A3(297 × 420 mm), Letter(8.5 × 11 in), Legal(8.5 × 14 in), A5(148 × 210 mm), B4(250 × 353 mm)
4. Input the margins you want to set (Top, Bottom, Left, Right) or click the preset margin options (Normal, Narrow, Wide)
5. Click 'Apply Settings' button to apply settings

buttons.name: Header & Footer
usage: 1. Click the 'Format' section
2. Click the Header & Footer icon
3. Click the 'Edit Header' button to add the header
4. Delete the existing header text and input the new header text if you want to add new header
5. Click the 'Edit Footer' button to add the footer
6. Delete the existing footer text and input the new footer text if you want to add new footer

buttons.name: Spell Check
usage: 1. Click the 'Tools' section
2. Click the Spell Check icon
3. Click the 'Start Check' button, the system will scan for spelling errors
4. Choose the correct spelling from the suggestions or click the 'Ignore' button to ignore the word

buttons.name: New Comment
usage: 1. Click the 'Tools' section
2. Click the New Comment icon
3. Input the comment you want to add in the comment content field
4. Input the author name in the comment author field
5. Select the comment priority level from the comment priority field (Low Priority, Normal Priority, High Priority, Urgent)
6. Click 'Add Comment to Selected Text' button to save
7. Select the text in the document you want to add the comment with the cursor
8. Click the selected text in the document can view the added comment

buttons.name: Bulleted List
usage: 1. Click the 'Tools' section
2. Click the Bulleted List icon
3. Place your cursor before any text where you want bullets
4. Click the 'Add Bullet' button, the text will be converted to a bulleted list item

buttons.name: Numbered List
usage: 1. Click the 'Tools' section
2. Click the Numbered List icon
3. Place your cursor before any text where you want numbers
4. Click the 'Add Number button, the text will be converted to a numbered list item

buttons.name: Increase Indent
usage: 1. Click the 'Tools' section
2. Click the Increase Indent icon
3. Select the paragraph you want to indent
4. Click the 'Increase Indent' button, the paragraph will move to the right
5. Click again the 'Increase Indent' button to indent more

buttons.name: Decrease Indent
usage: 1. Click the 'Tools' section
2. Click the Decrease Indent icon
3. Select the paragraph you want to unindent
4. Click the 'Decrease Indent button, the paragraph will move to the left
6. Click again the 'Decrease Indent' button to unindent more

buttons.name: Character Count
usage: 1. Click the 'Tools' section
2. Click the Character Count icon
3. Click the 'Show Character Count' button to show the character count, the count will be displayed in the document

buttons.name: Application Settings
usage: 1. Click the 'Help' section
2. Click the Application Settings icon
3. Choose the font you want to set (Arial, Times New Roman)
4. Choose the font size you want to set (12px, 14px, 16px, 18px, 20px)
5. Click 'Apply Default Font' button to apply changes

buttons.name: Page Break
usage: 1. Click the 'Help' section
2. Click the Page Break icon
3. Position cursor where you want the page break
4. Click the 'Insert Page Break' button, a page break will be inserted

buttons.name: Share Document
usage: 1. Click the 'Help' section
2. Click the Share Document icon
3. Choose sharing method: 'Social Media Sharing' or 'Generate Share Link'
4. For social media sharing: select platform(Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp) and share
5. For share link: click 'Generate Link' to create a shareable URL
